q1.text: What are our SLOs and escalation steps when the search index fails? Include pager expectations.

q2.text: Summarize the Q3 roadmap priorities for local memory search and explain the rationale behind them.

q3.text: State our data retention policy for indices and embeddings and outline the deletion process, including the default period.

q4.text: Describe the indexing and search algorithm: chunking configuration, TF-IDF vs embeddings usage, and how line numbers are handled.
